message:
test(sec66): add 11 E2E security scenario tests (bd-3fa19)

Comprehensive E2E security scenario suite covering:
- Benign workflow (no alerts)
- Adversarial escalation (exec deny/terminate)
- Trust lifecycle (quarantine → promote → kill-switch → re-onboard)
- Multi-extension isolation
- Incident evidence bundle forensic flow
- Shadow vs enforcement mode behavior
- Rollback/recovery after incident
- Alert category coverage
- Secret broker redaction in bundles
- JSONL artifact schema contract validation
- Deterministic artifact manifests

Every scenario emits structured JSONL logs with issue_id, extension_id,
capability, action, risk_score, and reason_codes for CI consumption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
